data.title: Uber And WeRide Partner For Robotaxi Service In Abu Dhabi
data.description: Uber and WeRide launch autonomous mobility service in Abu Dhabi. AVs now available on Uber platform in UAE, with plans for full driverless service in 2025.Uber and WeRide team up to offer AV rides in Abu Dhabi, marking the first time autonomous vehicles are available on Uber outside the US.

data.title: US Economy Adds 227,000 Jobs In November, Wage Growth Accelerates
data.description: Nov. jobs report shows stronger-than-expected hiring rebound & wage growth. Could reduce chances of rate cut & impact markets.

data.title: Bitcoin 'Breakout Is For Real,' Analyst Says On CNBC's Final Trades
data.description: On CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades," Bill Baruch of Blue Line Capital picked iShares Bitcoin Trust, saying this "breakout is for real."

data.title: GameStop Ahead Of Q3 Earnings: Will Meme Magic Last Or Metrics Rule?
data.description: GameStop to release third quarter earnings, analysts estimate a loss. Roaring Kitty's tweet reignites meme-stock excitement.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Worksport Shifts To Higher Margin Products, Sees Strong Demand In Holiday Season
data.description: Worksport Ltd. (NASDAQ: WKSP) experienced significant sales growth in B2C and B2B segments for October and November 2024, with improved margins and a focus on higher-margin branded products. CEO predicts strong demand and continued improvements in gross margin, setting the stage for future success.
